roa.docketEntryComment: NOTICE TERMINATION OF PROTECTIVE ORDER IN CRIM PROC - FILED BY PD,SOLOMON

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT AND SHERIFF WARRANT RETURN/INTC/SHERIFF WARRANT DISCHARGED/BWDNC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/X: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/

/CAL:STATUS OF CUSTODY/INTC/ACM/NALC/RX/SA2:HYDE STREET BETWEEN TURK ST& ELLIS ST, SF CA/SA4:'STAY AWAY FROM'/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:45 MINUTES/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/LDPX: 08-24-20/987,2/ACM/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, CUSTODY STATUS/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:SUBPOENAED RECORDS ARE RELEASED TO DEFENSECOUNSEL/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OF JUSTICE /EMTERM/
